description: NaCT transports citrate 3:1 Na+:citrate3-; electrogenic; feeds cytoplasmic citrate pool
High-Vmax NaCT in hepatocytes feeds ACLY-derived lipogenesis
NaCT-imported citrate chelates extracellular zinc; reduces metal toxicity
PXR induces SLC13A5 in liver (not CAR); AhR also active; brain TF enrichment via TFAM/NRF-like
All tested LoF variants converge on near-complete citrate transport loss
SLC13A5 in turquoise OXPHOS co-expression module; cerebral expression declines postnatally
mINDY KO metabolic protection recapitulates INDY longevity biology
mINDY KO AMPK activation predicts mTORC1 suppression; not directly measured in NaCT context
ACLY cleaves citrate to oxaloacetate + acetyl-CoA; primary acetyl-CoA source for ACh synthesis in cholinergic neurons
ACSS2 parallel route: acetate to nuclear acetyl-CoA; neuroprotective in tau models
ZIP1 zinc uptake inhibits aconitase; cataplerosis in osteoblasts leads to excess mineral citrate
SLC25A1 exports mitochondrial citrate to cytoplasm; interplays with NaCT-derived cytoplasmic citrate pool
Cytoplasmic citrate to ACLY to acetyl-CoA; feeds ACh synthesis and histone acetylation
Citrate to isocitrate to alpha-KG to glutamate to GABA; TCA-derived GABA precursor chain
Extracellular citrate chelates zinc and modulates NMDA receptor tone
Cytoplasmic acetyl-CoA from ACLY enters nucleus and supports H3K27ac/H3K9ac at synaptic genes; not demonstrated in NaCT-deficient neurons
AMPK to PGC-1alpha to mitochondrial biogenesis; both activated by NaCT loss in hepatocytes
AMPK to TSC2 to Rheb to mTORC1 suppression; predicted secondary consequence of NaCT loss in hepatocytes
Zinc modulates NMDA receptor activity; citrate buffering alters zinc availability for NMDA modulation
Alternative anaplerosis (glutamine, acetate, ketone bodies) compensates for absent NaCT-citrate; KD worsening suggests compensation is incomplete
mTORC1 suppression to autophagy; AMPK to mitochondrial biogenesis; established in general signaling; speculative in NaCT-specific context
PXR induction of SLC13A5 in liver increases citrate import and downstream lipogenesis
NaCT loss causes accumulation of citrate and TCA intermediates in plasma, urine, and CSF
NaCT loss in osteoblasts/ameloblasts triggers ZIP1 cataplerosis, excess mineral citrate incorporation, and defective enamel
Reduced GABA precursor flux reduces inhibitory tone and increases neonatal seizure susceptibility
Zinc chelation by citrate modulates NMDA excitability; NaCT loss may alter zinc-NMDA balance in neonatal brain
Reduced acetyl-CoA reduces histone acetylation at synaptic genes during critical developmental window; may cause permanent epigenetic deficit
Failure to establish H3K27ac at synaptic gene loci during critical developmental window leads to irreversible cognitive impairment
Mouse KO metabolic protection (reduced hepatic fat, improved insulin sensitivity) predicts analogous phenotype in DEE25 patients; untested in humans
ACLY-derived acetyl-CoA for fatty acid synthesis is analogous to myelin lipid synthesis in oligodendrocytes; NaCT loss may impair myelination
CSF citrate rises with aging (Lin-2021); plasma citrate predicts pre-dementia cognitive decline (Tremblay-Franco-2024); links NaCT biology to AD biomarker space
DEE25 patients represent the only natural human experiment for complete hepatic NaCT loss; hepatic phenotype has not been systematically studied
ACLY to acetyl-CoA to ACh synthesis established; cholinergic deficit is AD hallmark; NaCT upstream of ACLY in cholinergic neurons is speculative
OXPHOS module co-expression with SLC13A5; KEGG enrichment for AD/PD/HD pathways in turquoise module
AMPK-lipogenesis axis is the hepatic mechanism for metabolic disease protection; established in mouse model
mTORC1 suppression to autophagy to aggregate clearance; NaCT connection to neurodegeneration via mTOR is cross-domain inference
Conditional NaCT activity under hypoxia and glutamine deprivation in HCC cell lines; established in cell model
Cerebral SLC13A5 expression declines with aging; inferred consequence is reduced NaCT activity in aged cholinergic neurons relevant to AD
Epigenetic programming failure during critical developmental window leads to permanent cognitive architecture deficit; not directly measured in NaCT-deficient neurons
mTORC1 suppression during synaptogenesis impairs translation-dependent circuit formation; not measured in NaCT-deficient neurons
GABA shapes motor circuit excitability in spinal and cortical circuits; connection to DEE25 movement abnormalities is not NaCT-specific
SLC13A5 in oligodendrocyte precursor cells may impair myelin lipid synthesis and white matter development; SLC13A5 expression in OPCs not confirmed
citation: Rigby-2022 overexpression data; Dirckx-2022 OPC precedent

description: Dental enamel hypoplasia as a lifetime biomarker proxy for NaCT function level; indirect AD-risk inference
